text:
Once upon a time, in a dense woodland nestled beneath the mountains, there lived an old owl named Olga. Olga was a wise owl who knew many songs that never tired.

One spring morning, Olga went looking for some fresh berries. Her usual haunt was the forest clearing just outside the old castle.

There she discovered a beautiful red berry blossom. They glowed in the sunlight.

"Oh no." Olga hooted sadly. "Those are rare, these days. Even the birds prefer other plants."

There wasn't really anywhere else, she thought. I've spent years just keeping these little guys going.

Then, something fluttered above.

"What?' Olga hooted softly. "Oh wow!"

That couldn't be.
